name: Taitien Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Taitien Electronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells quartz frequency control components in Taiwan, the United States, Europe, and China. Its products include crystal units, crystal oscillators, VCXO, TCXO, OCXO, QCM, equipment, mini oven, and timing modules. The company serves automotive, consumer electronics, information technology, and telecommunication industries. Taitien Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
